prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次约6744→6444→5134→6362→5404，整体呈波动走势。2023年位次大幅前移至5134名，2024年回退至6362名，2025年又回升至5404名，近两年波动幅度约960名；2025年基准位次约5404名；该校在吉林省物理类招生计划2021–2023年均为61人，2024年增至66人，2025年增至67人；2026年计划仍为67人，与2025年持平，无扩缩招效应。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学主榜排名约第35名（2021年33名→2022年36名→2023年35名→2024年35名→2025年35名→2026年35名），排名持续稳定在全国前35位，属于顶尖211层次；2026年学校声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及国家卫健委通报的伪造成绩单和抄袭学位论文事件，可能对部分考生报考心理产生轻微抑制作用；但抖音热度总排名第1（高热），短视频平台曝光量极高，毕业典礼撑伞等暖心视频广泛传播，整体关注度处于高位，正面曝光与负面舆情并存；冶金工程A+、材料科学与工程A+、科学技术史A+、环境科学与工程A-，材料与冶金学科为全国顶尖水平，与该校理工科招生专业（材料类、机械类、能源动力类等）高度关联，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业社会热度高热推荐，与该校计算机类、自动化类、通信工程等招生专业匹配，可能吸引更多高分考生报考；吉林省2026年物理类考生约80047人，较2025年80421人略有减少，竞争压力微降；北京科技大学位于北京市（非本省），在吉林省物理类招生67人，占该校全国总招生计划比例较小；该校地处北京的地域优势对吉林省考生仍具较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次5404名、2026年招生计划持平、抖音高热带来的关注度提升、声誉偏负面部分抵消、考生总数微降等因素，预计2026年物理类最低位次在5374名附近，较2025年略有前移（竞争略加剧），区间4874–5874名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 6744 → 6444 → 5134 → 6362 → 5404, showing a fluctuating trend. In 2023, the ranking significantly advanced to 5134, retreated to 6362 in 2024, and rebounded to 5404 in 2025, with a fluctuation range of about 960 positions in the last two years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 5404. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Jilin Province was 61 students from 2021 to 2023, increased to 66 in 2024, and to 67 in 2025; the 2026 plan remains at 67, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or contraction effect.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; its ranking on the Soft Science China University Main Ranking is approximately 35th (33rd in 2021 → 36th in 2022 → 35th in 2023 → 35th in 2024 → 35th in 2025 → 35th in 2026), consistently stable among the top 35 nationally, belonging to the top-tier 211 level. In 2026, the university's reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving incidents of forged transcripts and plagiarized degree theses reported by the National Health Commission, which may have a mild inhibitory effect on some candidates' application psychology. However, its Douyin (TikTok) popularity ranks first overall (high heat), with extremely high exposure on short video platforms; heartwarming videos such as umbrella-holding at graduation ceremonies are widely spread, resulting in high overall attention, with both positive exposure and negative public opinion coexisting. Metallurgical Engineering A+, Materials Science and Engineering A+, History of Science and Technology A+, Environmental Science and Engineering A-; materials and metallurgy disciplines are at the national top level, highly relevant to the university's science and engineering enrollment majors (such as Materials, Mechanical, Energy and Power), strongly attracting applicants to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation are highly recommended in social heat, matching the university's enrollment majors like Computer, Automation, and Communication Engineering, potentially attracting more high-scoring candidates. In 2026, the number of Physics Category candidates in Jilin Province is approximately 80,047, slightly decreasing from 80,421 in 2025, reducing competition pressure slightly. The University of Science and Technology Beijing is located in Beijing (not within the province), enrolling 67 students in Physics Category in Jilin, accounting for a small proportion of the university's total national enrollment plan. The regional advantage of being in Beijing still strongly attracts candidates from Jilin Province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 5404, unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, increased attention from high Douyin heat, partial offset from slightly negative reputation, and a slight decrease in total candidates, it is predicted that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will be around 5374, slightly advanced compared to 2025 (slightly intensified competition), with a range of 4874–5874.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Science Experimental Class (Top Talent Program)
- Computer Category (Computer Science and Technology, Information Security, Internet of Things Engineering)
- Intelligent Materials Technology (High-Precision Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Automation Category (Automation, Measurement and Control Technology and Instruments, Intelligent Perception Engineering)
- Communication Engineering
- Artificial Intelligence
- Engineering Experimental Class (Outstanding Engineering Talents).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Mechanical Category (Robotics, Intelligent Manufacturing and New Energy Vehicles)
- Energy and Power Category (Energy and Power Engineering, New Energy Science and Engineering, etc.)
- Civil Category (no separate enrollment, related majors included in Engineering Category)
- Applied Chemistry.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 4874–5874, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If your ranking is significantly better than the upper limit of the range (<4874), you can primarily target top-tier majors like Science Experimental Class and Computer Category; if your ranking is near the lower limit of the range (>5874), you should mainly choose Tier 3 majors to ensure admission.

In 2026, the plan increases to 13 students, an expansion of 1 student (+8.3%) compared to 2025, which slightly alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; ranked approximately 35th on the Soft Science China University Main Ranking, with stable rankings in recent years, belonging to the top-tier 211 level. In 2026, the university's reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (academic misconduct incidents), but it ranks 1st in total Douyin popularity (high heat), indicating extremely high overall attention. History Category has few majors (only 3), so the impact of reputation fluctuations on liberal arts candidates is relatively limited. Advantageous disciplines such as Science and Technology History (A+) and Materials Science and Engineering (A+) are mainly in science and engineering, with no direct disciplinary mapping to History Category majors (Business Administration, Social Science Experimental Class, Foreign Languages and Literature), but the overall academic reputation has an indirect positive impact on liberal arts programs.

University of Science and Technology Beijing is located in Beijing, still having strong regional appeal for liberal arts candidates in Jilin Province. 预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 1312, the 2026 expansion of 1 student (+8.3%), increased Douyin popularity, partially offset by negative reputation, and a slight decrease in total candidates, it is predicted that the minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 will be around 1358, slightly lower than 2025 (competition slightly eased), with a range of 1154–1562.
